basic_details.job_title: DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for GDA/MNO/FNO and Office Subordinate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Krishna (DCHS Krishna)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Krishna (DCHS Krishna) GDA/MNO/FNO and Office Subordinate Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website krishna.ap.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Krishna GDA/MNO/FNO and Office Subordinate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC&EWS: 5 years, Physically handicapped persons: 10 years, Ex-servicemen: deduct 3 years in addition to service rendered.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board
qualification.details: GDA/MNO/FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. OFFICE SUBORDINATE: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

selection_process: Aggregate marks in qualifying examination (75 marks) Weightage for government service experience Weightage for years since passing qualifying examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Krishna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://krishna.ap.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCHS Krishna Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Krishna Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board

content_sections.heading: DCHS Krishna Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCHS Krishna Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCHS Krishna Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: GDA/MNO/FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. OFFICE SUBORDINATE: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

content_sections.heading: DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC&EWS: 5 years, Physically handicapped persons: 10 years, Ex-servicemen: deduct 3 years in addition to service rendered.

content_sections.heading: DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Aggregate marks in qualifying examination (75 marks) Weightage for government service experience Weightage for years since passing qualifying examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Krishna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://krishna.ap.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the GDA/MNO/FNO and Office Subordinate posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in the DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the GDA/MNO/FNO and Office Subordinate posts in the DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. For SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 300/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month for all the advertised posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on aggregate marks in the qualifying examination, weightage for government service experience, and weightage for years since passing the qualifying examination.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a government job or a contractual position?
faq.answer: The DCHS Krishna Recruitment 2026 is for contractual positions. The job type is clearly mentioned as contractual in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services Krishna, which is https://krishna.ap.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: The application form needs to be submitted offline. Candidates should send the completed application form along with all required documents to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post or Registered Post.
